All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ClientConfiguration
Interface for Meilisearch Config.
ClientConfigurationBuilder
A builder for Meilisearch Config.
DefaultEntityMapper
Default implementation of EntityMapper using Jackson's ObjectMapper.
Document
Identifies a domain object to be persisted to Meilisearch.
EntityMapper
Interface to map entity to JSON and vice versa.
JsonHandlerBuilder
Builder class that creates a JSON handler for Meilisearch client.
MappingMeilisearchConverter
MeilisearchConverter Implementation based on MappingContext.
MeilisearchClientBeanDefinitionParser
BeanDefinitionParser class that parses the client tag in the XML configuration file.The client tag is parsed by setting the host URL, API key, JSON handler, and client agents.
MeilisearchClientFactoryBean
FactoryBean class that creates a Meilisearch Client.
MeilisearchConfiguration
Base class for a @Configuration class to set up the Meilisearch connection using the Meilisearch Client.
MeilisearchConverter
Meilisearch converter aware of MappingContext.
MeilisearchNamespaceHandler
NamespaceHandler class that registers namespaces in the XML configuration file.
MeilisearchPersistentEntity<T>
Meilisearch specific PersistentEntity abstraction.
MeilisearchPersistentProperty
Meilisearch specific PersistentProperty abstraction.
MeilisearchPersistentProperty.PropertyToFieldNameConverter
 
SimpleMeilisearchMappingContext
Meilisearch specific AbstractMappingContext implementation.
SimpleMeilisearchPersistentEntity<T>
Meilisearch specific BasicPersistentEntity implementation holding.
SimpleMeilisearchPersistentProperty
Meilisearch specific PersistentEntity implementation holding.
